raw.subject: Oshkosh Food Truck Scene; Something I noticed about NamasteWisconsin
raw.body:
Hi,

I love seeing the impact of a great product on a community. Your Butter Chicken Burrito post was a clear hit with the people of Oshkosh! It's clear you're doing something special with your Indian food truck.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for fans to find you when they're craving your food.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea based on the photos and posts you share on Facebook. It includes a menu hero section to showcase your signature dishes and a map & directions block to help customers find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/namastewisconsin-oshkosh

If you're interested in turning this into a simple website that helps you reach more customers, we can discuss a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. No need to reply if you're not interested in exploring further, but I'd love to chat about it if you'd like to get a quote.
